overall.description: A cinematic walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets, massive digital billboards, and wet reflective surfaces. The camera follows a character through covered walkways, ascending stairs through narrow corridors, and crossing busy intersections in a high-density urban environment with moderate vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian street with overhead digital screens

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet pavement beneath large overhead digital billboards

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead in the distance along the covered walkway

entered.detail: massive curved digital billboard displaying colorful advertisements overhead
futuristic building facades with glowing neon signage
concrete planter with small trees along the walkway edge
reflective wet concrete surface showing neon light reflections

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered cyberpunk street at night, with massive digital billboards overhead and neon signs illuminating the wet pavement. The camera follows the character walking forward past sparse pedestrians, with modern glass buildings lining the right side and planters on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: stairwell and narrow corridor with red neon accents

events.description: begins ascending concrete stairs leading upward
enters darker corridor illuminated by red circular neon lights on the left wall

agents.ego_description: climbing concrete stairs and proceeding through a narrow corridor with red neon lighting

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase leading upward between building walls
large circular red neon light fixtures mounted on the corridor wall
red and yellow illuminated fast food advertisement sign

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a concrete stairwell into a narrow, enclosed corridor. The environment shifts from open neon-lit street to a darker passage with distinctive red circular neon lights on the left wall. A 'Burrito XXL' sign becomes visible as the character approaches the corridor exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional tunnel with green ceiling lights

events.description: exits tunnel into large open plaza with glass canopy ceiling

agents.ego_description: walking through a tunnel with green fluorescent ceiling lights toward an open plaza

notable_agents.action: person walking toward the camera from the plaza entrance

entered.detail: rectangular green fluorescent light panels lining the tunnel ceiling
blue illuminated sign with medical symbol above tunnel exit
large transparent glass roof structure visible at tunnel exit

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a tiled tunnel illuminated by green ceiling lights, passing advertisement screens on the walls. The tunnel leads toward a bright opening where a large glass canopy ceiling becomes visible, marking the transition to an open plaza area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with glass canopy and neon installations

agents.ego_description: walking through the spacious plaza passing purple neon pillars and digital advertisements

entered.detail: tall vertical purple neon light strips mounted on building columns
massive screens displaying advertisements on building facades
rectangular planters with purple neon lighting and small trees

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tunnel, the scene opens into a vast pedestrian plaza sheltered by a high glass canopy ceiling. Purple neon pillars line the left side while massive digital billboards cover the surrounding buildings. The character walks past illuminated planters and scattered pedestrians toward a street intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with yellow crosswalk markings

events.description: approaches crosswalk and waits for vehicles to pass before crossing
begins crossing the street with a companion pedestrian

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk then crossing the busy street with a companion while vehicles pass by

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car driving through the intersection
companion in white tank top crossing the street alongside the ego

entered.detail: bold yellow striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
futuristic cars and taxis driving through the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character reaches a busy urban intersection, exiting the sheltered plaza for the open street. After waiting for traffic, the character crosses the yellow-marked crosswalk alongside a companion in a white tank top, while futuristic vehicles drive past. The scene features towering buildings with massive digital advertisements on all sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a neon-lit covered street through a series of enclosed passages and into a vast, open urban intersection. It begins by following a character past massive digital billboards and glass buildings on a wet pavement, before ascending a concrete stairwell into a darker, narrow corridor marked by red circular neon lights and a Burrito XXL sign. The scene then shifts into a tiled tunnel illuminated by green ceiling lights and advertisement screens, which gradually opens toward a bright glass canopy. As the camera emerges from the tunnel, the environment expands into a wide pedestrian plaza lined with purple neon pillars and towering digital displays. Finally, the character exits the sheltered plaza to cross a yellow-marked intersection alongside a companion, moving amidst futuristic vehicle traffic under the glow of massive advertisements.
